sections.paragraph: constr. זְדֹון (as if from the root זָדָה = זִיד), with suff. זְדֹנְךָ 1Sa 17:28 Jer 49:16, swelling, pride; as joined with insolence and arrogance, haughtiness. Pro 11:2 13:10 21:24 , זְדֹון לִבֶּךָ “the haughtiness of the heart;” Jer 49:16 Oba 1:3 Deu 17:12. As a concrete used of Babylon, as the most haughty, Jer 50:31, 32 Jer 50:32.
